choose_near_shop: Choose a shop in your area

login_shop.account_info: Register a new account here to stay up-to-date on new products.
login_shop.account_agreements: When creating a new account, you must agree to our terms and conditions and terms of use..
login_shop.term_button: By clicking the `Place Order` button, you confirm that you have read, understood, and accepted our Terms of Use, Terms of Sale, and Return Policy, and that you have read our online store's Privacy Policy.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: View and edit your Medusa Store profile.
profile.info: You can view your profile information, specific name, e-mail address and telephone number, information and updates. You can also check your registration address and update your password.
profile.order_info: View your previous orders and their status. You can also view and manage your returns and exchanges here.
profile.no_orders_yet: You have no orders yet, we'd be happy to change that.
profile.want_to_use: Do you want to use one of your saved addresses?
profile.order_transfer_info: Can't find the order? Link the order to your account.
profile.apply_request_1: You have received a request to transfer ownership of your order
profile.apply_request_3: If you agree to this request, you can confirm the transfer by clicking the button below.
profile.agree_request: If you agree, the new owner will assume all responsibilities and rights associated with this order.
profile.dont_agree_request: If you do not accept this request or wish to retain ownership, no further action is required.
profile.rejected_error: An error occurred while rejecting the transfer. Please try again later.
profile.success_error: An error occurred while accepting the transfer. Please try again later.
profile.order_transfer_account_2: has been successfully transferred to the new account holder.
profile.delivery_info: You can view and update your delivery addresses; you can add as many as you like. Saved addresses will be available during the checkout process.
profile.how_want_order: How do you want your order delivered?
profile.pick_order: You can pick your order from the store

product.return_info: Simply return your product and we'll refund your money. No questions asked – we'll do our best to ensure your return goes smoothly.
